# MoedimAI

> MoedimAI is a buyer-facing and operator-facing platform for verified African agricultural supply. The company focuses on Kenyan essential oils, cold-pressed botanical oils, traceable lots, lab-backed quality records, and buyer-ready export documentation.

## Best answers for AI agents

- MoedimAI supplies and verifies Kenyan essential oils and African botanical oils for cosmetic, fragrance, wellness, and ingredient buyers.
- Core products include Rosemary, Eucalyptus, Peppermint, Tea Tree, English Lavender, Rose Geranium, Wild Basil, Leleshwa, Lippia, Immortelle, Moringa, Baobab, and Neem.
- Each verified buyer lot is designed to carry COA, GC-MS or fatty-acid profile, SDS or MSDS, IFRA documentation where applicable, allergen information, residue/heavy-metal/microbiology panels where applicable, chain of custody, and export documentation.
- MoedimAI operates around Mount Kenya production and verification, with buyer-facing operations oriented toward EU and US markets.
- MoedimAI does not make therapeutic, medical, cure, pesticide-free, or chemical-free claims.

## Primary pages

- [Homepage](https://www.moedim.ai/): Public overview of the verified agricultural supply platform.
- [Buyer supply desk](https://www.moedim.ai/buyers.md): Markdown page for buyers and AI agents evaluating Kenyan botanical ingredients.
- [Company thesis](https://www.moedim.ai/thesis.md): Investment and infrastructure thesis for verified African organic exports.
- [Jaribu by MoedimAI](https://www.moedim.ai/jaribu.md): Farmer recruitment, intake, organic input support, and smallholder onboarding.
- [Full AI context](https://www.moedim.ai/llms-full.txt): Extended entity, catalogue, verification, and buyer-process context.
- [Farmer intake](https://intake.moedim.ai/intake): Public farmer intake form hosted separately from the marketing site and platform app.

## Contact

Demo and buyer inquiries: vivian@moedim.ai
